item.title: Is the Middle East’s “rupture” becoming global?. [ thedailystar ]
item.description:
[Priority]

Systemic Significance

Selected by: Gemini-2.5-Flash-Lite, Kimi-K2-Instruct, Qwen-3-32B, GPT-OSS-120B

item.title: The unfinished promise to Bangladesh’s women. [ thedailystar ]
item.description:
[Priority]

Systemic Significance

Selected by: Gemini-2.5-Flash-Lite, Qwen-3-32B, GPT-OSS-120B

The 13th parliament, in its inaugural session on Thursday, saw the slim presence of seven female members in a cohort of 300. The 50 reserved seats for women, once inducted based on proportional representation, may reduce the gender gap.
